mapper.select: SELECT id, supplier_id as "supplierId", applicant_name as "applicantName", business_name as "businessName", business_type as "businessType", documents_json as "documentsJson", verification_notes as "verificationNotes", training_progress as "trainingProgress", training_completed_modules_json as "trainingCompletedModulesJson", resubmission_count as "resubmissionCount", submitted_at as "submittedAt", rejection_reason as "rejectionReason", current_state as "stateId" FROM supplier_onboarding WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT current_state as "stateId", count(*) as "count" FROM supplier_onboarding GROUP BY current_state ORDER BY count(*) DESC
SELECT count(*) FROM supplier_onboarding WHERE current_state IN ('APPLICATION_SUBMITTED', 'DOCUMENT_VERIFICATION', 'BUSINESS_VERIFICATION')

SELECT id, applicant_name as "applicantName", business_name as "businessName", business_type as "businessType", current_state as "stateId", submitted_at as "submittedAt", resubmission_count as "resubmissionCount" FROM supplier_onboarding WHERE current_state IN ('APPLICATION_SUBMITTED', 'DOCUMENT_VERIFICATION', 'BUSINESS_VERIFICATION') ORDER BY ${_sortColumn} ${_sortOrder} LIMIT #{_limit} OFFSET #{_offset}
SELECT count(*) FROM supplier_onboarding WHERE current_state NOT IN ('COMPLETED', 'REJECTED') AND submitted_at IS NOT NULL AND DATEDIFF('DAY', submitted_at, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) > 15

SELECT id, applicant_name as "applicantName", business_name as "businessName", current_state as "stateId", submitted_at as "submittedAt", DATEDIFF('DAY', submitted_at, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) as "daysSinceSubmission" FROM supplier_onboarding WHERE current_state NOT IN ('COMPLETED', 'REJECTED') AND submitted_at IS NOT NULL AND DATEDIFF('DAY', submitted_at, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) > 15 ORDER BY ${_sortColumn} ${_sortOrder} LIMIT #{_limit} OFFSET #{_offset}

SELECT id, supplier_id as "supplierId", applicant_name as "applicantName", business_name as "businessName", business_type as "businessType", current_state as "stateId", training_progress as "trainingProgress", training_completed_modules_json as "trainingCompletedModulesJson", resubmission_count as "resubmissionCount", submitted_at as "submittedAt", verification_notes as "verificationNotes", rejection_reason as "rejectionReason" FROM supplier_onboarding WHERE supplier_id = #{supplierId} ORDER BY submitted_at DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY

SELECT id, current_state as "stateId", training_progress as "trainingProgress", training_completed_modules_json as "trainingCompletedModulesJson", resubmission_count as "resubmissionCount" FROM supplier_onboarding WHERE id = #{id}
